sentence: Diversitas IT Sustavi d.o.o., Miroševečina 9 10040 Zagreb, OIB: 47614915143, (hereinafter referred to as „we“, „to us“, „our“, etc.) is the owner of the app that linked you to this privacy policy (herein reffered to as "app"). We created this privacy statement to show that we care about the privacy of our users and in order to inform them about the manners of collection and processing of personal data on this website. Please read this Statement carefully in order to learn how your personal data is collected, processed, protected or used in any other way.

Personal data means any information related to an identified or identifiable person. An identifiable person is one who can be identified, directly or indirectly, in particular by reference to an identifier such as a name, an identification number, location data, an online identifier or to one or more factors specific to the physical, physiological, genetic, mental, economic, cultural or social identity of that person. You should bear in mind that non-personal information and data can be automatically collected by means of our web servers or by use of cookies. Click here to read our cookie policy. Examples of data on your use of the website include: the most visited and viewed websites and links on our website, time spent viewing the site, the most popular key words that bring people to our site, your IP address, data collected via cookies, data of your device such as hardware settings, system activity, type of search engines etc.
We use the data obtained about you for one or several mentioned purposes: In order to personalize your user experience (collected data helps us to respond better to your individual needs);

We use the data obtained about you for one or several mentioned purposes: In order to improve our website (we are constantly trying to improve the offer of our website based on feedback from our visitors)

Some of our apps use face recognition and tracking to change your apperance or to animate an avatar. The image of your face is only processed on your device and not transmited or uploaded to us or any 3rd party. In our communication apps using animated avatars your avatar is presented to other users in the same call as you with your current facial expression, but this data is anonymized into a generic expression and doesn't contain any personally identifiable data, and your face and apperance can not be reconstructed or infered from the transmitted data. No face data is ever stored or uploaded to us or any 3rd party, outside of other users participating in the same call as you.
Data protection officer who you can contact for any questions or complaints related to our privacy policy or handling personal data. Contact data of our officer for data protection: katarina@divit.hr
In order to protect personal data you are sending through this website, we use physical, technical and organizational safety measures. We are continuously upgrading and testing our safety technology.

In case of personal data breach, we will notify you and the competent authority via email within 72 hours on the scale of breach, data involved, possible impact on our services and our planned measures for data protection and restriction of any harmful impacts on individuals.

section: H2:The breach notice will not be sent in case:
sentence: if technical and organisational protection measures (such as encryption) were applied to the personal data affected by the personal data breach, which render the personal data unintelligible to any person who is not authorized to access it;

section: H2:The breach notice will not be sent in case:
sentence: if we have taken subsequent measures to ensure that the high risk to the rights and freedoms of individuals is no longer likely;

section: H2:The breach notice will not be sent in case:
sentence: if it would involve disproportionate effort (in such a case we will notify you via public communication or similar equally efficient measure).

section: H2:The breach notice will not be sent in case:
sentence: Personal data breach means a breach of security leading to the accidental or unlawful destruction, loss, alteration, unauthorised disclosure of, or access to, personal data transmitted, stored or processed related to offering of our services.
By using the app you agree with our Privacy Policy.

In case of any changes to our privacy policy we will inform you of such changes on this website and update the date of changes to the privacy policy as stated below. This privacy policy was last changed on 1 October 2018.
